patient.name: Liam Thompson
symptoms: mild heel pain after prolonged sitting
discomfort in the morning when getting out of bed
occasional tightness in the calf muscles
differences in foot arch noticed recently
patient.medical_history: Has a history of experiencing occasional lower back pain, which was attributed to an old sports injury. Recently, has taken up running again after a long break.

decision.triage_reasoning: The patient's symptoms are mild and not indicative of a life-threatening condition. They exhibit minor discomfort related to heel pain and tightness in calf muscles, likely related to increased activity after a long break. No significant acute distress is noted, and the condition does not pose an immediate risk.
decision.notes: Patient may benefit from advice on proper footwear and stretches for calf and heel pain. Current medications (Ibuprofen) are appropriate for managing discomfort.
decision.context_for_next: Advised to monitor symptoms and report any worsening or persistence. Recommended rest and possible follow-up if symptoms do not improve.
